# =U= assignment: variable is available in mk expansion but not exported
# to the recipe's environment.

mk -p 1 -f mkfile
# mk-expanded value should appear
stdout 'mk: secret_value'
# Shell env should NOT contain SECRET (it's unexported)
! stdout 'env: SECRET='
# Shell env should contain EXPORTED
stdout 'env: EXPORTED=exported_value'

# Reassigning with plain = should restore export behavior.
mk -p 1 -f mkfile.reexport
stdout 'env: SECRET=now_exported'

-- mkfile --
SECRET =U= secret_value
EXPORTED = exported_value

all:V:
	echo mk: $SECRET
	env | grep '^SECRET=' | sed 's/^/env: /' || true
	env | grep '^EXPORTED=' | sed 's/^/env: /' || true

-- mkfile.reexport --
SECRET =U= hidden
SECRET = now_exported

all:V:
	env | grep '^SECRET=' | sed 's/^/env: /' || true
